actionCalls.name: Committee_Vote_Complete_to_Triage_Slack
actionCalls.label: Committee Vote Complete to Triage Slack

actionCalls.name: Copy_2_of_Sales_Rationale_Completed_to_Triage
actionCalls.label: Committee Vote Requested to Comm Slack

actionCalls.name: Sales_Rationale_Completed_to_Triage_Slack
actionCalls.label: Sales Rationale Completed to Triage Slack

decisions.name: Check_for_Triage_Team_Owner_Email
decisions.label: Check for Triage Team Owner Email

rules.name: Bid_Assigned_but_Lead_Co_Lead_or_Co_Lead_2_ischanged
rules.conditionLogic: (1 AND 2) AND ( (3 AND 6) OR (4 AND 7) OR (5 and 8) )
rules.label: Bid Assigned but Lead, Co-Lead, or Co-Lead 2 ischanged

Flow.description: 9/2 -- added NGO exception to Slack channel logic 8/26 -- updated Committee Vote Requested logic to reference a metadata table for the Slack email channels

formulas.name: GPS_HTML_Body
formulas.expression:
"" & "You have been assigned a project. Please provide sales rationale
"& "Click Here" & ""

formulas.name: GPS_HTML_Body_Formula
GPS_Subject_Formula
Lead_Email_Body
formulas.expression: "Test Lead and Co-Lead Bid Assigned Email Template" + {!GPS_Project_URL}

Flow.interviewLabel: GPS RFP GNG Override Email Notification {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: GPS RFP Email Notifications

textTemplates.name: Bid_Assigned_Text_Template
textTemplates.text:
Congratulations! {!$Record.GPS_Lead__r.FirstName} {!$Record.GPS_Lead__r.LastName}, you have been assigned to support this Project. The assigned RFX Team Member please be sure to:


  • Schedule a kickoff call within 1 business day of this assignment.
  • Please review all fields in the Project record and manage and update all appropriate fields.
  • Conclude the Project record upon completion of your assignment.


If you have any questions about this assignment, please discuss it with your manager accordingly.


Thank you!

cc: @{!$Record.AE__r.Email} @{!$Record.SE__r.Email}



Project Name: {!$Record.ProjectName__c}

Lead: {!$Record.GPS_Lead__r.FirstName} {!$Record.GPS_Lead__r.LastName}

Co-Lead: {!$Record.GPS_Co_Lead__r.FirstName} {!$Record.GPS_Co_Lead__r.LastName}

Sales Organization: {!$Record.Cloud__c}

Region: {!$Record.Org62_Account_Locked_Region__c}

Org62 Opportunity: {!$Record.Org62_Opp_Name__c}

GPS Project Status: {!$Record.GPS_Project_Status__c}

Category: {!$Record.Category__c}

Questions Due Date: {!$Record.Questions_Due_Date__c}

Due Date: {!$Record.GPS_Due_Date__c}

Special Instructions: {!$Record.Special_Instructions__c}

textTemplates.name: Committee_Vote_Complete_Text_Template
textTemplates.text:
Hi Triage Team: This RFx has all completed GNG Committee votes and is ready to be assigned and/or actioned accordingly.



Project Name: {!$Record.ProjectName__c}

Sales Organization: {!$Record.Cloud__c}

Region: {!$Record.Org62_Account_Locked_Region__c}

Org62 Opportunity: {!$Record.Org62_Opp_Name__c}

GPS Project Status: {!$Record.GPS_Project_Status__c}

Category: {!$Record.Category__c}

Due Date: {!$Record.GPS_Due_Date__c}

Questions Due Date: {!$Record.Questions_Due_Date__c}

Go/No-Go Score: {!$Record.GNG_Score__c}

textTemplates.name: Committee_Vote_Requested_Text_Template
textTemplates.text:
This RFx requires GNG Committee review due to a low GNG score. Please go to the GNG Exception tab in the Project Record and insert your vote and rationale within one business day.



Project Name: {!$Record.ProjectName__c}

Sales Organization: {!$Record.Cloud__c}

Region: {!$Record.Org62_Account_Locked_Region__c}

Org62 Opportunity: {!$Record.Org62_Opp_Name__c}

GPS Project Status: {!$Record.GPS_Project_Status__c}

Category: {!$Record.Category__c}

Due Date: {!$Record.GPS_Due_Date__c}

Questions Due Date: {!$Record.Questions_Due_Date__c}

Go/No-Go Score: {!$Record.GNG_Score__c}

Scorecard: {!$Record.GNG_Score_Card__c}

textTemplates.name: QC_Auditor_Text_Template
textTemplates.text:
You have been assigned as a QC Coach to this project. Please ensure you advise the Project Lead on your availability.


 If you have any questions about this assignment, please discuss it with your manager accordingly.


 Thank you! 


Project Name: {!$Record.ProjectName__c}

Sales Organization: {!$Record.Cloud__c}

Lead: {!$Record.GPS_Lead__r.FirstName} {!$Record.GPS_Lead__r.LastName}

Co-Lead: {!$Record.GPS_Co_Lead__r.FirstName} {!$Record.GPS_Co_Lead__r.LastName}

Region: {!$Record.Org62_Account_Locked_Region__c}

Org62 Opportunity: {!$Record.Org62_Opp_Name__c}

GPS Project Status: {!$Record.GPS_Project_Status__c}

Category: {!$Record.Category__c}

Target Complete Date: {!$Record.GPS_Target_Complete_Date__c}

Due Date: {!$Record.GPS_Due_Date__c}

Special Instructions: {!$Record.Special_Instructions__c}

textTemplates.name: Sales_Rationale_Completed_Text_Template
textTemplates.text:
All of the rationales are completed and ready for triage review for next steps.



Project Name: {!$Record.ProjectName__c}

Sales Organization: {!$Record.Cloud__c}

Region: {!$Record.Org62_Account_Locked_Region__c}

Org62 Opportunity: {!$Record.Org62_Opp_Name__c}

GPS Project Status: {!$Record.GPS_Project_Status__c}

Category: {!$Record.Category__c}

Due Date: {!$Record.GPS_Due_Date__c}

Questions Due Date: {!$Record.Questions_Due_Date__c}

Go/No-Go Score: {!$Record.GNG_Score__c}

textTemplates.name: Sales_Rationale_Requested_Text_Template
textTemplates.text:
The GNG score is {!$Record.GNG_Score__c} and is below the 150 point GNG threshold. This will now proceed to the GNG Committee for review.


All of you need to provide rationales as to why we should proceed in GPS Utopia for this opportunity no later than one business day. Please click on the project link below and navigate to the GNG Exception Tab where there is a field to insert your rationale. Once rationales are complete, the GNG Committee will vote to provide either full or limited support. Note, the RFx team typically turns these around in one business day.


Project Name: {!$Record.ProjectName__c}

Sales Organization: {!$Record.Cloud__c}

Region: {!$Record.Org62_Account_Locked_Region__c}

Org62 Opportunity: {!$Record.Org62_Opp_Name__c}

GPS Project Status: {!$Record.GPS_Project_Status__c}

Category: {!$Record.Category__c}

Due Date: {!$Record.GPS_Due_Date__c}

Questions Due Date: {!$Record.Questions_Due_Date__c}

Go/No-Go Score: {!$Record.GNG_Score__c}

textTemplates.name: Security_Review_Complete_Text_Template
textTemplates.text:
Security Review is Completed and is ready for next steps!



Project Name: {!$Record.ProjectName__c}

Sales Organization: {!$Record.Cloud__c}

Region: {!$Record.Org62_Account_Locked_Region__c}

Org62 Opportunity: {!$Record.Org62_Opp_Name__c}

GPS Project Status: {!$Record.GPS_Project_Status__c}

Category: {!$Record.Category__c}

Questions Due Date: {!$Record.Questions_Due_Date__c}

Due Date: {!$Record.GPS_Due_Date__c}

textTemplates.name: Security_Review_Text_Template
textTemplates.text:
Hello {!$Record.Security_Reviewer__r.FirstName} {!$Record.Security_Reviewer__r.LastName}, the following RFx is ready for your security review. The RFx documents that need to be reviewed are attached to the GPS Utopia Project record.



﻿Project Name: {!$Record.ProjectName__c}

Sales Organization: {!$Record.Cloud__c}

Region: {!$Record.Org62_Account_Locked_Region__c}

Org62 Opportunity: {!$Record.Org62_Opp_Name__c}

GPS Project Status: {!$Record.GPS_Project_Status__c}

Category: {!$Record.Category__c}

Questions Due Date: {!$Record.Questions_Due_Date__c}

Due Date: {!$Record.GPS_Due_Date__c}

Go/No-Go Score: {!$Record.GNG_Score__c}
